intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar palabras de transporte.

sample_sentences.pt-BR: O carro está estacionado lá fora.

sample_sentences.es-ES: El autobús llega a las ocho.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le bus arrive à huit heures.

sample_sentences.en: We took the train to the city.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Nós pegamos o trem para a cidade.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Tomamos el tren a la ciudad.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Nous avons pris le train pour la ville.

sample_sentences.en: She rides her bicycle to school.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ela vai de bicicleta para a escola.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Va en bicicleta a la escuela.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Elle va à l'école à vélo.

sample_sentences.en: The station is near the hotel.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: A estação fica perto do hotel.
sample_sentences.es-ES: La estación está cerca del hotel.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: La gare est près de l'hôtel.

sample_sentences.en: Keep your ticket in your pocket.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Guarda tu billete en el bolsillo.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Garde ton billet dans ta poche.

sample_sentences.en: The road is quiet at night.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: A estrada fica tranquila à noite.
sample_sentences.es-ES: La carretera está tranquila por la noche.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: La route est calme la nuit.

sample_sentences.en: We arrived at the airport early.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Nous sommes arrivés tôt à l'aéroport.

sample_sentences.en: Get off at the next stop.
